data.summary: The exploratory step lacks sufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the persona scenario regarding the audit trail between the 'AI agent' and human actor. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates the existence of such an audit trail or how it can be validated. The linked use cases and prior step evidence do not address the specific requirements of capturing traces and snapshots for this scenario, leading to an inconclusive result.
gaps: No evidence of an audit trail showing 'AI agent' vs human actor.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Provide evidence of audit trail implementation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Demonstrate how the audit trail is captured and validated in the system.
